case_title: SELIN, ROBERTA VS WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,343.94 AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK
CERTIFIED RECEIPT SENT TO SHERRILL JOHNSON (WASHINGTON MUTUAL) RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELIN, ROBERTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK $1,278.30 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,304.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
